zh.Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾科比 克諾夫萊

zh.lifeSummary: Emma de Lascelles是Sir Roger de Lascelles和Mrs Roger de Lascelles的女兒，於1117年出生在英國越可爾科比 克諾夫萊。她於大約1135年與Peter FitzEssulf結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1183年在英國越可爾柏金享年66歲。

zh-hans.Birkin, Yorkshire, England, United Kingd: 英国英格兰越可爾柏金
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Emma de Lascelles是Sir Roger de Lascelles和Mrs Roger de Lascelles的女儿，于1117年出生在英国越可爾科比 克諾夫萊。她于大约1135年与Peter FitzEssulf结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1183年在英国越可爾柏金享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: Emma de Lascelles was born in 1117, in Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of Sir Roger de Lascelles and Mrs Roger de Lascelles. She married Peter FitzEssulf about 1135. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1183, in Birkin, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Emma de Lascelles est née en 1117, à Kirby Knowle, Everwyck, Angleterre, fille de Sir Roger de Lascelles et Mrs Roger de Lascelles. Elle a épousé Peter FitzEssulf environ 1135. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1183, à Birkin, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Emma de Lascelles wurde 1117 in Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, England, als Tochter von Sir Roger de Lascelles und Mrs Roger de Lascelles geboren. Sie hat um 1135 Peter FitzEssulf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1183 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Birkin, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Emma de Lascelles è nata il nel 1117 nel Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, England come figlia di Sir Roger de Lascelles e Mrs Roger de Lascelles. Lei sposato Peter FitzEssulf circa 1135. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1183, nel Birkin, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Lascellesは1117年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルビー ノウルでSir Roger de LascellesとMrs Roger de Lascellesの娘として生まれた。約1135年にPeter FitzEssulfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1183年にイギリスヨークシュアイアバーキンで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Lascelles(은)는 1117년 영국 요르크실르 커비 노우일에서 Sir Roger de Lascelles(와)과 Mrs Roger de Lascelles의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1135년 Peter FitzEssulf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1183년 영국 요르크실르 비르킨에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Birkin, Yorkshire, England, United Kingd: Birkin, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Emma de Lascelles nasceu em 1117, em Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filha de Sir Roger de Lascelles e Mrs Roger de Lascelles. Ela casou-se com Peter FitzEssulf aproximadamente 1135. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1183, em Birkin, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Emma de Lascelles родилась в 1117 г. в местности кирби ноул, еркшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Sir Roger de Lascelles и Mrs Roger de Lascelles. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter FitzEssulf около 1135 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1183 г. в местности биркин, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Emma de Lascelles nació en 1117, en Kirby Knowle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hija de Sir Roger de Lascelles y Mrs Roger de Lascelles. Se casó con Peter FitzEssulf aproximadamente 1135. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1183, en Birkin, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
